notes: This file is an example only. Copy it to %USERPROFILE%\.codex-launcher\launcher-config.json before editing.
codexPath and ccswitchPath are optional. Leave them empty unless auto-discovery fails.
historySyncBackendPath is optional. Leave it empty when codex-history-sync-windows-work is next to this project.
Do not place API keys, OAuth tokens, passwords, cookies, provider secrets, or auth.json contents here.
Third-party keys and provider routing remain managed by CCSwitch.
